title: How to Fake Being Busy
text:
## How to Fake Being Busy

**Step 1:** Open {number} tabs and one spreadsheet labeled {adjective} {plural noun}.

**Step 2:** Type {adverb} while staring at a {color} chart nobody asked for.

**Step 3:** Schedule a {adjective} meeting about the {object} initiative.

**Step 4:** Reply to emails with phrases like "per my last {noun}" and "circle back after I {verb}."

**Step 5:** Walk quickly through the {place} holding a {object} and a worried {emotion} expression.

**Step 6:** Mute yourself, then {verb ending in -ing} like you are solving a {adjective} crisis.

**Step 7:** End the day by {verb ending in -ing} one {food} item and calling it deep work.
